notableEvents.label: Orlando Arcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Orlando Arcia grounds into a double play, shortstop Jared Triolo to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Josh Bell out at 2nd. Orlando Arcia out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Luke Keaschall picked off and caught stealing 2nd base. Luke Keaschall to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.
